task.name: Party Mode Review Loop
task.description: Iteratively run multi-agent party mode discussions and automatically apply consensus fixes for N loops.
task.objective: Automate iterative collaborative refinement cycles with party mode orchestration and auto-fixing.

step.title: Initialize Loop
step.action: Log start of iterative party mode review for {{loops}} cycles.

step.title: Iterative Cycle
step.action: If sizeOf({{content}}) > 500 lines OR countFiles({{content}}) > 5: 1. Shard content into domains or line-ranges. 2. Launch parallel _bmad/core/workflows/party-mode/workflow.md for each shard with focus="Targeted review: {{target_feature}}". 3. Perform Collision Check for consensus fixes across shards. 4. Merge consensus fixes into consolidated fix list. Else: Execute _bmad/core/workflows/party-mode/workflow.md with focus="Review and find improvements for: {{content}} (Target: {{target_feature}})"
Execution Validation: Verify party mode session ended with 'SYNTHESIS' success. If orchestrator failed, log 'ERROR' and reset early exit pass counter.
Primary Agent (Facilitator) collects all agent recommendations.
Primary Agent automatically applies all consensus fixes to the content.
Log findings and applied fixes for this iteration.
Update content variable for the next iteration.
Early Exit Check: If findings count == 0 for 3 consecutive SUCCESSFUL iterations, terminate loop early.

step.title: Finalize and Report
step.action: Output: "Iterative Party Mode Review Complete. {{loops}} cycles finished."
